title: AI Services Product Stack
subtitle: What We've Built & How to Use It to Land Client #1
author: William Marceau | Marceau Solutions
content_markdown:
## WHAT WE'VE BUILT

### Lead Discovery & Enrichment

**`apollo_pipeline.py`** ‚Äî Full Apollo.io pipeline: search contacts by industry + location, enrich with email/phone/LinkedIn, export to CSV. This is how you build the prospect list every morning.

**`apollo_mcp_bridge.py`** ‚Äî MCP integration for Apollo. Lets Claude Code and Clawdbot query Apollo directly in conversation ‚Äî no browser needed. Used for live lead lookup during sprint.

**`google_places.py`** ‚Äî Scrapes Google Maps for local business listings (name, phone, address, category, rating, review count). Primary source for Naples walk-in targets.

**`enrichment.py`** ‚Äî Secondary enrichment layer: adds website status, social presence, and basic contact info to a raw business list. Run after google_places.py.

**`website_validator.py`** ‚Äî Checks if a business's website is live, has a contact form, has chat, and has basic SEO. Helps prioritize outreach (no chat widget = pain signal).

**`lead_scoring.py`** ‚Äî Scores each lead 0-100 based on: industry match, call volume signals, website gaps, review complaints, and contact info availability. Tells you who to hit first.

**`revalidate_leads_v2.py`** ‚Äî Re-scores and re-validates an existing lead list. Run weekly to refresh stale data.

**`segment_prospects.py`** ‚Äî Segments a prospect list into tiers: hot (high score, clear pain), warm (medium score, some signals), cold (low score or no signals). Routes each tier to the right outreach sequence.

**`competitor_enrichment.py`** ‚Äî Pulls competitor presence data for each lead's industry ‚Äî useful for the "your competitor is already using this" angle.

**`yelp.py`** ‚Äî Alternative lead source via Yelp API. Good for restaurants and med spas that don't rank on Google Maps.

**`linkedin.py`** ‚Äî LinkedIn company + contact lookup. Use for decision-maker identification in medical/dental practices.

---

### Cold Outreach

**`cold_outreach.py`** ‚Äî Core email outreach engine. Sends personalized first-touch emails using SMTP. Reads from a lead CSV, personalizes subject + body, logs every send to SQLite. This is the main outreach workhorse.

**`email_scheduler.py`** ‚Äî Schedules emails across a time window (e.g., stagger 50 emails between 9am-5pm). Prevents spam filters, mimics human send patterns.

**`outreach_scheduler.py`** ‚Äî Coordinates full outreach campaigns: which leads to hit, which template to use, what day in the sequence, time-zone-aware sending.

**`sms_outreach.py`** ‚Äî SMS outreach via Twilio. ONLY for opted-in contacts. Never cold-SMS a business owner ‚Äî TCPA risk.

**`sms_scheduler.py`** ‚Äî Schedules and staggers SMS sends for opted-in contacts.

**`outreach_image_generator.py`** ‚Äî Generates personalized outreach images (business name + pain stat) for email/social attachments.

**`a_b_test.py`** / **`ab_testing.py`** ‚Äî A/B test outreach subject lines and body copy. Run after 50+ sends to identify top-performing variants.

**`outreach_optimizer.py`** ‚Äî Analyzes send history and recommends the best time of day, day of week, and template variant based on open/reply rate data.

---

### Follow-Up & Nurture

**`follow_up_sequence.py`** ‚Äî Runs the full 10-day follow-up drip (Days 0, 2-3, 5, 7, 10). Reads reply/open status and skips leads who already responded.

**`send_followup.py`** ‚Äî Sends a single follow-up email to a specific lead. Use manually when you need to re-engage someone outside the automated sequence.

**`lead_nurture_scheduler.py`** ‚Äî Schedules nurture sequences for leads who showed interest but didn't close. Runs 7-day and 14-day tracks.

**`response_tracker.py`** ‚Äî Monitors reply inbox and marks leads as responded in the database. Feeds into follow_up_sequence to prevent double-touching active conversations.

**`opt_out_manager.py`** ‚Äî Handles unsubscribe/stop requests. Mandatory for CAN-SPAM compliance. Marks leads as opted-out in SQLite so they never get contacted again.

---

### CRM & Pipeline

**`execution/lead_manager.py`** ‚Äî Master lead intake system. Takes a new lead (name, email, phone, project type) and creates a ClickUp CRM task, sends welcome email, sends SMS opt-in, kicks off research, and schedules nurture. The hub that connects all the pieces.

**`execution/add_lead.py`** ‚Äî Lightweight version of lead_manager ‚Äî adds a lead to ClickUp and sends a welcome email. Used for manual/quick intake.

**`crm_sync.py`** ‚Äî Syncs lead status between the local SQLite DB and ClickUp. Run daily to keep CRM current.

**`docket.py`** ‚Äî Priority docket: pulls your highest-value open leads and formats a "today's hits" list. Run every morning to know who to call/email first.

**`models.py`** (lead-scraper) ‚Äî Lead and campaign data models. SQLite schema for all lead data.

**`projects/shared/sales-pipeline/src/models.py`** ‚Äî Sales pipeline data models: stages, deal values, conversion tracking.

**`projects/shared/sales-pipeline/src/app.py`** ‚Äî Sales pipeline web app backend (Flask).

**`projects/shared/sales-pipeline/src/ui.py`** ‚Äî Sales pipeline dashboard UI. Launch via `./scripts/sales-pipeline.sh` ‚Üí http://127.0.0.1:8794.

---

### Analytics & Monitoring

**`campaign_analytics.py`** ‚Äî Full campaign performance report: sends, opens, replies, meetings booked, conversion rate by template and segment.

**`campaign_dashboard.py`** ‚Äî Web dashboard for campaign stats. Live view of outreach performance.

**`campaign_monitor.py`** ‚Äî Background monitor that alerts via Telegram when reply rates drop or bounce rates spike.

**`lead_analytics.py`** ‚Äî Lead pipeline analytics: conversion rate by source, stage, industry, and outreach type.

**`weekly_report.py`** ‚Äî Generates weekly outreach report. Run every Sunday to prep for Monday accountability check-in.

**`weekly_monitor.py`** ‚Äî Scheduled weekly health check for the outreach pipeline ‚Äî dead leads, stalled sequences, low-credit APIs.

**`utm_tracker.py`** ‚Äî UTM parameter tracking for any web links in emails. Tells you which links get clicks.

**`voice_ai_tracker.py`** ‚Äî Tracks call attempts, voicemail rates, and call-back rates for phone outreach.

**`social_media_tracker.py`** ‚Äî Tracks social engagement on LinkedIn and X for leads you're warming up via content.

---

### n8n Workflows (Active on EC2)

**Follow-Up-Sequence-Engine** (`w8PYKJyeozM3qJQW`) ‚Äî Automated multi-step follow-up engine. Triggers off lead status changes.

**Automation-Lead-Capture** (`dATO8F4MoPcpOKiA`) ‚Äî Captures leads from the marceausolutions.com automation/AI services form.

**Website-Lead-Capture** (`WHFIE3Ej7Y3SCtHk`) ‚Äî Captures all contact form submissions from marceausolutions.com.

**Lead-Magnet-Capture** (`hgInaJCLffLFBX1G`) ‚Äî Captures lead magnet downloads (guide, checklist, etc.).

**Automation-Nurture-7Day** (`cV2e9opfEKR1Tx5v`) ‚Äî 7-day email nurture sequence for automation service leads.

**Non-Converter-Followup** (`Y2jfeIlTRDlbCHeS`) ‚Äî Re-engages leads who went cold after showing interest.

**Morning-Accountability-Checkin** (`XNrR99vPCUp89X8L`) ‚Äî 6:45am ET Mon-Fri: Clawdbot sends daily outreach prompt via Telegram.

**EOD-Accountability-Checkin** (`0Zf8nNv1AphA0W6s`) ‚Äî 7pm ET Mon-Fri: EOD numbers prompt.

**Weekly-Accountability-Report** (`krxeoSZMMPBZGAPv`) ‚Äî Sunday 7pm: full weekly scorecard.

---

## THE SPRINT WORKFLOW ‚Äî HOW TO USE THIS TOGETHER

### Step 1: Build the List (Apollo + Google Places)

```
apollo_pipeline.py ‚Üí outputs naples-{industry}-{date}.csv
google_places.py  ‚Üí outputs naples-places-{date}.csv
enrichment.py     ‚Üí adds website/social data
lead_scoring.py   ‚Üí scores every lead 0-100
segment_prospects.py ‚Üí splits into hot/warm/cold tiers
```

Target: 50-100 new scored leads per day. Focus outreach on hot tier (score 70+) first.

### Step 2: First Touch (cold_outreach.py)

```
cold_outreach.py --list hot-leads.csv --template A (general) or B (trades)
email_scheduler.py ‚Üí staggers sends 9am-5pm to avoid spam filters
```

Use Template B for HVAC/plumbing/trades. Template A for medical/dental/general.

### Step 3: Monitor Replies (response_tracker.py)

Runs every 2 hours via launchd. When a lead replies:
- Lead flagged as "responded" in SQLite ‚Üí removed from automated sequence
- You pick up the conversation manually
- Book via calendly.com/wmarceau/ai-services-discovery

### Step 4: Automated Follow-Up (follow_up_sequence.py)

For non-responders, the 10-day sequence fires automatically:
- Day 0: First touch (already sent)
- Day 2-3: Bump
- Day 5: ROI math angle
- Day 7: Phone call attempt (manual)
- Day 10: Breakup email

### Step 5: Discovery Call ‚Üí Close

Lead books via Calendly ‚Üí n8n Automation-Lead-Capture fires ‚Üí you get a Telegram alert. Run the discovery call script. Close with the free 2-week trial offer.

### Step 6: Onboard in n8n

New client confirmed ‚Üí spin up their Twilio number + n8n text-back workflow within 24 hours. Test end-to-end. Go live Day 3.

### Step 7: Results ‚Üí Referral

Day 7 check-in: pull their recovered lead count. Day 10: convert to $297/mo Stripe subscription. Day 14: ask for referral.

---

## DAILY ROUTINE (Sprint Days 1-14)

### Morning (30 min)
1. **Clawdbot sends you today's accountability prompt at 6:45am** ‚Äî answer it
2. `docket.py` ‚Äî pull today's priority leads (highest score, most likely to reply)
3. `apollo_pipeline.py` ‚Äî build or refresh today's prospect batch
4. Review yesterday's reply inbox ‚Äî respond to any warm leads first

### Mid-Morning (60 min ‚Äî outreach block)
5. `cold_outreach.py` ‚Äî send today's first touches (10-20 emails)
6. Walk-ins (if day allows): 3-5 local businesses with cards + quick pitch
7. Phone calls: any leads at Day 7 in sequence (manual call step)

### Afternoon (30 min)
8. `response_tracker.py` ‚Äî check for replies, respond to any that came in
9. `campaign_analytics.py` ‚Äî check open rates, adjust subject lines if below 20%
10. Update sales pipeline dashboard with any new conversations or meetings booked

### Evening (15 min)
11. **EOD Accountability Checkin at 7pm via Clawdbot** ‚Äî report numbers
12. `weekly_report.py` (Sundays) ‚Äî prep for weekly review

### Key Metric: 10 outreach actions per day minimum
- Email sends count
- Walk-ins count
- Phone calls count
- DMs count

---

## SYSTEM HANDOFFS ‚Äî HOW IT ALL CONNECTS

```
APOLLO / GOOGLE PLACES
        ‚Üì
  enrichment.py
  lead_scoring.py
  segment_prospects.py
        ‚Üì
  cold_outreach.py ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚Üí email_scheduler.py (staggers timing)
        ‚Üì
  response_tracker.py ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚Üí flags replies, removes from sequence
        ‚Üì
  follow_up_sequence.py (10-day drip for non-responders)
        ‚Üì
  [CALENDLY BOOKING]
        ‚Üì
  n8n: Automation-Lead-Capture ‚Üí Telegram alert to William
        ‚Üì
  DISCOVERY CALL (manual)
        ‚Üì
  execution/lead_manager.py ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚Üí ClickUp CRM task + welcome email + SMS
        ‚Üì
  FREE TRIAL (n8n: Twilio + text-back workflow built manually)
        ‚Üì
  Day 7: check-in call with results
  Day 14: Stripe subscription ‚Üí $297/mo
        ‚Üì
  n8n: Stripe-Invoice-Paid ‚Üí Telegram alert + Sheets log
        ‚Üì
  REFERRAL ASK
```

### Key Integration Points

- **Apollo ‚Üí CSV**: `apollo_pipeline.py` exports to `output/apollo_pipeline_{date}.csv`
- **CSV ‚Üí Outreach**: `cold_outreach.py --list` reads that CSV directly
- **Outreach ‚Üí SQLite**: every send logged to `leads.db` (tracked by response_tracker.py)
- **SQLite ‚Üí Sequence**: `follow_up_sequence.py` reads `leads.db` for sequence state
- **Calendly ‚Üí n8n**: webhook fires `Automation-Lead-Capture` on every booking
- **n8n ‚Üí Telegram**: Clawdbot gets notified of every new lead and Stripe payment
- **Stripe ‚Üí Sheets**: `Stripe-Invoice-Paid` logs every payment to the AI pipeline tracker
- **Weekly**: `campaign_analytics.py` + `weekly_report.py` ‚Üí review performance, adjust templates
